channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [M&M] Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd Transfers Shares to Stock Option Grantees
item.description:
Mahindra & Mahindra Ltd has transferred shares to the stock option grantees from Mahindra & Mahindra Employees’ Stock Option Trust. The transfer is in compliance with the undertaking given to the Exchanges at the time of listing of shares that were allotted to Mahindra & Mahindra Employees’ Stock Option Trust. The shares were transferred on 12th March 2026, pursuant to the exercise of the Stock Options granted under the Company’s Employees’ Stock Option Scheme.

  • Transfer of shares from Mahindra & Mahindra Employees’ Stock Option Trust to stock option grantees
  • Compliance with the undertaking given to the Exchanges at the time of listing of shares
  • Transfer pursuant to the exercise of the Stock Options granted under the Company’s Employees’ Stock Option Scheme
  • Total of 10,000 shares transferred to 50 grantees

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MAHINDRA & MAHINDRA LTD. | Category: ESOP

item.title: [TINNATFL] Fratelli Vineyards Ltd. Issues Corporate Guarantee of Rs. 72.50 Crore to SVC Co-op. Bank Ltd.
item.description:
Fratelli Vineyards Ltd. announced that its Board of Directors approved the issuance of a Corporate Guarantee of Rs. 72.50 crore in favor of SVC Co-op. Bank Ltd. The guarantee is provided for the renewal of borrowing facilities sanctioned to Fratelli Wines Private Limited, a wholly owned subsidiary. The guarantee is a contingent liability for the company, with no impact except for the guaranteed amount.

  • Fratelli Vineyards Ltd. to issue a Corporate Guarantee of Rs. 72.50 crore for SVC Co-op. Bank Ltd.
  • The guarantee is provided for the renewal of borrowing facilities sanctioned to Fratelli Wines Private Limited.
  • The guarantee is a contingent liability for Fratelli Vineyards Ltd.
  • No impact on the company, except for the guaranteed amount.
  • The decision was made at the Board Meeting held on March 12, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Tinna Trade Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [KUNDANMM] Kundan Minerals and Metals to Invest in Wholly Owned Subsidiary Kundan Gold Mines
item.description:
Kundan Minerals and Metals Limited (KUNDANMM) has announced a proposed investment in its wholly owned subsidiary, Kundan Gold Mines Private Limited. The decision was made at a board meeting on March 12, 2026. The investment is aimed at supporting the expansion plans of Kundan Gold Mines Private Limited, enabling it to undertake its proposed business activities more effectively.

  • Kundan Minerals and Metals Limited to invest in its wholly owned subsidiary, Kundan Gold Mines Private Limited
  • Investment aimed at supporting the subsidiary's expansion plans
  • Kundan Gold Mines Private Limited engaged in prospecting, exploration, and mining of minerals and metals
  • Investment to be made on an arm's length basis
  • No regulatory approvals required for the acquisition

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Kundan Minerals And Metals Ltd | Category: Investment

item.title: [IOB] Indian Overseas Bank Reduces One-Month MCLR by 10 bps, Effective from 15.03.2026
item.description:
The Asset Liability Management Committee (ALCO) of the Indian Overseas Bank has reviewed the MCLR workings as on 10.03.2026 and decided to reduce the One-Month MCLR by 10 basis points (bps) effective from 15.03.2026. The revised MCLR rates are as follows: Overnight MCLR remains unchanged at 7.5%, One-Month MCLR is now 8.20% (down from 8.30%), Three-Month MCLR remains unchanged at 8.40%, Six-Month MCLR remains unchanged at 8.65%, One-Year MCLR remains unchanged at 8.80%, Two-Year MCLR remains unchanged at 8.80%, and Three-Year MCLR remains unchanged at 8.85%.

  • Indian Overseas Bank reduces One-Month MCLR by 10 bps
  • New MCLR rates effective from 15.03.2026
  • Overnight MCLR remains at 7.5%
  • Three-Month, Six-Month, One-Year, Two-Year, and Three-Year MCLR rates unchanged

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: INDIAN OVERSEAS BANK | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [SCANPRO] Scan Projects Ltd Submits Merger Application to NCLT Chandigarh
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Scan Projects Ltd has applied before the Hon'ble National Company Law Tribunal (NCLT) Bench in Chandigarh for a merger. The merger scheme has been approved in the board of directors meeting of both companies on 18 September 2025. Scan Projects Ltd is the transferee company, while Chandrapur Industry Private Ltd is the transferor company. The merger application was uploaded on the NCLT Chandigarh on 11 March 2026 with application/case number 0404116/00574/2026.

  • Scan Projects Ltd has applied for a merger with Chandrapur Industry Private Ltd
  • The merger scheme was approved in the board of directors meeting of both companies on 18 September 2025
  • Scan Projects Ltd is the transferee company and Chandrapur Industry Private Ltd is the transferor company
  • The merger application was uploaded on the NCLT Chandigarh on 11 March 2026 with application/case number 0404116/00574/2026

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SCAN PROJECTS LTD. | Category: Merger

item.title: [AMFORG] Amforge Industries Ltd. to Shift Registered Office within Mumbai from March 13, 2026
item.description:
Amforge Industries Ltd. has announced the shifting of its registered office address from 1118, Dalamal Tower, 11th Floor Free Press Journal Marg, Nariman Point, Mumbai, Maharashtra, India, 400021 to B-61, Floor-6, Plot -210, Mittal Tower, Free Press Journal Marg, Nariman Point, Mumbai- 400021, with effect from 13th March, 2026. The new address will also serve as the corporate office address for communication.

  • Amforge Industries Ltd. to shift its registered office within Mumbai city.
  • New registered office address: B-61, Floor-6, Plot -210, Mittal Tower, Free Press Journal Marg, Nariman Point, Mumbai- 400021.
  • New address to be effective from 13th March, 2026.
  • New address will also serve as the corporate office address for communication.
  • The decision was made in a Board of Directors meeting held on March 12, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: AMFORGE INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [ANIKINDS] Anik Industries Ltd Reports on Re-lodgment of Shares for February 2026
item.description:
Anik Industries Ltd has released a report on the re-lodgment of shares for the month of February 2026. The report, in compliance with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/MIRSD/MIRSD-PoD/P/CIR/2025/97 dated July 02, 2025, provides tabular details of re-lodgement under a special window. The report includes the number of requests received, processed, approved, and rejected during the mentioned period. The average time taken for processing these requests is also included.

  • Anik Industries Ltd releases report on re-lodgment of shares for February 2026.
  • The report includes the number of requests received, processed, approved, and rejected.
  • The average time taken for processing these requests is also provided.
  • Compliance with SEBI Circular No. SEBI/HO/MIRSD/MIRSD-PoD/P/CIR/2025/97 dated July 02, 2025.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ANIK INDUSTRIES LTD. | Category: Monthly Update

item.title: [MOTHERSON] Samvardhana Motherson International Ltd May Declare Interim Dividend for FY 2025-26
item.description:
Samvardhana Motherson International Ltd has announced that its Board of Directors will meet on March 19, 2026, to consider the declaration of an interim dividend for the financial year 2025-26. This announcement was made in accordance with Regulation 29 of the SEBI (Listing Obligations and Disclosure Requirements) Regulations, 2015.

  • Samvardhana Motherson International Ltd scheduled a Board Meeting on March 19, 2026
  • The meeting will consider the declaration of an interim dividend for the financial year 2025-26
  • The announcement was made in accordance with SEBI regulations

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Samvardhana Motherson International Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [FILATEX] Filatex India Ltd Announces Name Change of Wholly Owned Subsidiary Texfil Private Limited to Ecosis Limited
item.description:
Filatex India Ltd has announced the change of name of its Wholly Owned Subsidiary, Texfil Private Limited to Ecosis Limited. The change will be effective from 12th March, 2026. This information is for records and further communication.

  • Filatex India Ltd has announced the name change of its Wholly Owned Subsidiary, Texfil Private Limited.
  • The new name of the subsidiary will be Ecosis Limited.
  • The change will be effective from 12th March, 2026.
  • This is a business update from Filatex India Ltd.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: FILATEX INDIA LTD.-$ | Category: Business Update

item.title: [HARISH] Harish Textile Engineers Ltd's EGM Voting Results Approve Issuance of Equity Shares on Preferential Basis
item.description:
Harish Textile Engineers Ltd, a company based in Mumbai, held an Extra-Ordinary General Meeting (EGM) on 11th March, 2026. The meeting was conducted through Video Conferencing (VC) and Other Audio-Visual Means (OAVM). The company had appointed M/s. D N Vora & Associates, Practicing Company Secretaries, as the Scrutinizer for the e-voting process. The Scrutinizer's Report indicates that the resolution to issue equity shares on preferential basis to the persons belonging to the Promoter and Non-promoter Category was approved by the shareholders with the requisite majority.

  • Harish Textile Engineers Ltd held an EGM on 11th March, 2026
  • The meeting was conducted through VC and OAVM
  • M/s. D N Vora & Associates appointed as Scrutinizer for the e-voting process
  • Resolution to issue equity shares on preferential basis approved by shareholders
  • The approval was given with the requisite majority

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Harish Textile Engineers Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
